Cause found: As per the latest review, high cooling water inlet temperature combined with reduced cooling duty.
Action taken: On review, checked valve operation and exchanger fouling, and bumped up cooling water flow accordingly.
Learning: Pattern matches TEP fault 4; recommend tracking XMEAS(21);XMV(10) in future checks.
